intro: Acorus calamus powder, also known as calamus powder, is a natural herbal supplement derived from the root of the Acorus calamus plant, commonly used in traditional medicine. Rich in bioactive compounds such as volatile oils and alkaloids, this powder is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate digestive issues and promote overall well-being. However, it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using acorus calamus powder, especially in large quantities or for extended periods, due to its potential interactions with medications and side effects.
